title: Patrician IV: Rise of a Dynasty

notes: Game installs OK. All menus work OK. Gameplay is as good as native, including sound. However, it does not first launch the Kalypso launcher, instead straight to game. This disables internet play (Co-op mode). Have not tested local LAN play but it appears that it would work. My guess is that other platinum reviews ignored missing internet ability. Looked for launcher but found only .dll's.
title: Patrician IV: Rise of a Dynasty

notes: The game seems to run, but multiplayer (the bit I installed it for) does not. It seems to never connect to the Kalypso server. My friend had a similar issue on windows though and only solved with much massaging, so it might just be a buggy game.
